commands.description: Show help, environment list, and current configuration
commands.output:
Usage: hf.config.sh [show|set|clear|doctor|bootstrap|env] [args...]

Commands:
  show [env-name]         Show current configuration
  set <key> <value>       Set a configuration value
  clear <key>             Clear a configuration value
  clear all               Clear all configuration
  doctor                  Check which scripts are ready to use
  bootstrap [env-name]    Interactive environment setup
  env list                List environments
  env show [name]         Show config with environment overrides
  env activate <name>     Activate an environment

Environments
  ○ local                          9 properties
  ○ gke-amarin                     9 properties
  ○ gke-amarin_2                   2 properties
  ● kind                           2 properties (active)
  ○ compose                        9 properties

HyperFleet Configuration
  Config dir: /Users/amarin/.config/hf
  Environment: kind
  Active: kind

hyperfleet
  api-url                             http://localhost:8000
  api-version                         v1
  token                               <not set>
  context                             kind-kind  [kind]
  namespace                           amarin-ns1  [kind]
  gcp-project                         hcm-hyperfleet
  cluster-id                          019dbf43-65c5-7562-9077-e0a2331a1070
  cluster-name                        test-1e317d46
  nodepool-id                         019dbf43-7199-7ea6-b786-d617fc793c28

maestro
  maestro-consumer                    cluster1
  maestro-http-endpoint               http://localhost:8100
  maestro-grpc-endpoint               localhost:8090
  maestro-namespace                   maestro

portforward
  pf-api-port                         8000
  pf-pg-port                          5432
  pf-maestro-http-port                8100
  pf-maestro-http-remote-port         8000
  pf-maestro-grpc-port                8090

database
  db-host                             localhost
  db-port                             5432
  db-name                             hyperfleet
  db-user                             hyperfleet
  db-password                         <set>

rabbitmq
  rabbitmq-host                       localhost
  rabbitmq-mgmt-port                  15672
  rabbitmq-user                       guest
  rabbitmq-password                   <set>
  rabbitmq-vhost                      /

registry
  registry                            amarin
commands.notes: With no args, shows help + environment list + full config. Same as 'show' but with help header.

commands.description: Show current configuration values grouped by section
commands.notes: Properties come from HF_CONFIG_REGISTRY in hf.lib.sh. Values read from ~/.config/hf/<key> files. Passwords shown as '<set>' or '<not set>'.

commands.description: List available environment profiles with property counts
commands.output:
Environments
  ○ local                          9 properties
  ○ gke-amarin                     9 properties
  ○ gke-amarin_2                   2 properties
  ● kind                           2 properties (active)
  ○ compose                        9 properties
commands.notes: Active env marked with ● (green), inactive with ○. Environments stored as <env-name>.<property> files in ~/.config/hf/

commands.description: Show config with environment-specific overrides highlighted
commands.notes: Same as 'show' but highlights properties that come from the environment with [env-name] suffix in cyan

commands.description: Check which scripts have all required config set
commands.output:
Config Doctor
  ● hf.cluster.adapter.post.status.sh
  ● hf.cluster.conditions.sh
  ... (44/44 scripts ready)
commands.notes: Scans all scripts for hf_require_config lines using sed, cross-references with current config values. Green ● = ready, red ● = missing config.

commands.description: Display the current cluster ID from config
commands.notes: Simply reads ~/.config/hf/cluster-id file. Exits with error if not set.
